parent.subtitle: Your private space for support, information, and connection.

practitioner.subtitle: Tools and resources for healthcare professionals and support organisations.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Sovereignty
privacy.description: Your data stays under your control. We follow Te Mana Raraunga principles and the NZ Privacy Act.
privacy.encryption: Documents are encrypted and stored securely.

consent.title: Consent & Sharing
consent.subtitle: You are in control of your information. Review and change your preferences at any time.
consent.manage: Manage who can access your information
consent.analyticsDescription: Help us improve the platform by sharing anonymous usage data. No personal information is collected.
consent.supportDescription: Allow us to suggest connections with other whānau in similar circumstances.
consent.disclaimer: You can withdraw consent at any time. Withdrawing consent will not affect services already received.
